masked_case_json.world_change: a large-cap enterprise hardware and infrastructure supplier was already in a confirmed server-demand upcycle with a large order backlog. a major defense buyer then awarded it a multi-year blanket purchase agreement for enterprise software and infrastructure standardization shortly before a scheduled earnings release. the event added a durable public-sector demand signal on top of an already accelerating hardware cycle. presented in a shifted, non-identifying market era with no date, administration, calendar-quarter, or contemporaneous-news cues.
